{{Quote|All vaporators break down. If you knew anything about vaporators, you’d know that.|Borno|<ref name="TG" />}}
'''Borno''' was an [[Askajian/Legends|Askajian]] leader of a caravan of refugees, who sought asylum on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He was responsible for sneaking [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and three [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] out of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] into a desert canyon known for occasionally sheltering [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawlers]].<ref name="TG" />
